title: SecurityProviderRightsEvent
description: A class to specify the Pledgor/Obligor/Chargor Rights Event election.

includeCoolingOffLanguage.description: The Pledgor/Obligor/Chargor Rights Event election includes cooling off language when the attribute is set of True.

fullDischarge.description: If specified as applicable here, a Pledgor/Obligor/Chargor Rights Event will not occur unless the Pledgor/Obligor/Chargor (A) has provided a statement to the Secured Party in respect of such Early Termination Date.

automaticSetOff.description: The Automatic Set-Off provision applies when the value is set to True.

customElection.description: A custom Pledgor/Obligor/Chargor Rights Event election might be specified by the parties.
